## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Pixis and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and onboard new team members.](https://fathom.video/share/xybaVBpSuJts17kUsrz_Ad8TjH6qerE2?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance improving despite recent website issues; one article led to a sales call](https://fathom.video/share/xybaVBpSuJts17kUsrz_Ad8TjH6qerE2?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Transitioning to Claude AI for article generation has significantly improved quality](https://fathom.video/share/xybaVBpSuJts17kUsrz_Ad8TjH6qerE2?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)
  - [New team members joining both Pixis (Colin) and GrowthX (Jakub, Rachel)](https://fathom.video/share/xybaVBpSuJts17kUsrz_Ad8TjH6qerE2?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [Opportunity to refine content strategy by analyzing niche topic performance and competitive landscape](https://fathom.video/share/xybaVBpSuJts17kUsrz_Ad8TjH6qerE2?tab=summary&timestamp=2326.0)

## Topics

### Team Introductions and Updates

  - [Jason (Pixis): Expanding marketing team; new hire starting Monday for agency brand](https://fathom.video/share/xybaVBpSuJts17kUsrz_Ad8TjH6qerE2?tab=summary&timestamp=21.0)
  - [Colin (Pixis): New head of content/community (day 3); eager to learn and contribute](https://fathom.video/share/xybaVBpSuJts17kUsrz_Ad8TjH6qerE2?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
  - [Jakub (GrowthX): New addition (week 3); extensive content/SEO background](https://fathom.video/share/xybaVBpSuJts17kUsrz_Ad8TjH6qerE2?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
  - [Aida (GrowthX): Lead editor, content strategy/quality](https://fathom.video/share/xybaVBpSuJts17kUsrz_Ad8TjH6qerE2?tab=summary&timestamp=111.0)
  - Rachel (GrowthX): Account manager, primary editor (not present)
  - [Jimmy (GrowthX): Focuses on link building and business diversification](https://fathom.video/share/xybaVBpSuJts17kUsrz_Ad8TjH6qerE2?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)

### Content Performance and Reporting

  - [Adjusted weekly tracking in Looker Studio (Sun-Mon vs. Wed-Tues)](https://fathom.video/share/xybaVBpSuJts17kUsrz_Ad8TjH6qerE2?tab=summary&timestamp=560.0)
  - [Recent dip in performance due to website issues, but not severe](https://fathom.video/share/xybaVBpSuJts17kUsrz_Ad8TjH6qerE2?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
  - [Landing page breakdown available; Google Analytics integration pending for referral traffic from LLMs](https://fathom.video/share/xybaVBpSuJts17kUsrz_Ad8TjH6qerE2?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)
  - [SEMrush position tracking report set up (currently 27 pages, expanding)](https://fathom.video/share/xybaVBpSuJts17kUsrz_Ad8TjH6qerE2?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Link acquisition page in Notion tracks secured and published backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/xybaVBpSuJts17kUsrz_Ad8TjH6qerE2?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

### Content Generation Process

  - [Detailed workflow in AirOps: keyword input → brief → research → outline → full article → internal linking](https://fathom.video/share/xybaVBpSuJts17kUsrz_Ad8TjH6qerE2?tab=summary&timestamp=1309.0)
  - [Transitioned from ChatGPT to Claude AI, improving quality](https://fathom.video/share/xybaVBpSuJts17kUsrz_Ad8TjH6qerE2?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)
  - [Custom backend with API calls and engineering support for advanced requirements](https://fathom.video/share/xybaVBpSuJts17kUsrz_Ad8TjH6qerE2?tab=summary&timestamp=1175.0)
  - [Open to incorporating client-provided materials (reports, podcasts, etc.) into workflow](https://fathom.video/share/xybaVBpSuJts17kUsrz_Ad8TjH6qerE2?tab=summary&timestamp=1352.0)

### Content Strategy and Optimization

  - [Focus on niche topics related to everyday growth marketing tasks performing well](https://fathom.video/share/xybaVBpSuJts17kUsrz_Ad8TjH6qerE2?tab=summary&timestamp=2406.0)
  - [Opportunity to refine competitor analysis and topic selection](https://fathom.video/share/xybaVBpSuJts17kUsrz_Ad8TjH6qerE2?tab=summary&timestamp=2346.0)
  - [Balancing AI-focused content with broader marketing topics](https://fathom.video/share/xybaVBpSuJts17kUsrz_Ad8TjH6qerE2?tab=summary&timestamp=2326.0)
  - [Adapting to changing priorities (e.g., creating cluster pages for pillar content)](https://fathom.video/share/xybaVBpSuJts17kUsrz_Ad8TjH6qerE2?tab=summary&timestamp=2476.0)

### Collaboration and Feedback

  - [Colin to provide examples of preferred voice/tone and any new positioning/feature updates](https://fathom.video/share/xybaVBpSuJts17kUsrz_Ad8TjH6qerE2?tab=summary&timestamp=1042.0)
  - [GrowthX team open to recalibrating content style if needed](https://fathom.video/share/xybaVBpSuJts17kUsrz_Ad8TjH6qerE2?tab=summary&timestamp=1637.0)
  - [Aiming for \~15 approved articles in pipeline to maintain production cadence](https://fathom.video/share/xybaVBpSuJts17kUsrz_Ad8TjH6qerE2?tab=summary&timestamp=998.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jimmy to walk Colin through AirOps backend and content generation process](https://fathom.video/share/xybaVBpSuJts17kUsrz_Ad8TjH6qerE2?tab=summary&timestamp=1156.0)
  - [Aida to share Notion link and meeting agenda in Slack](https://fathom.video/share/xybaVBpSuJts17kUsrz_Ad8TjH6qerE2?tab=summary&timestamp=2727.0)
  - [Colin to review existing brand guidelines and voice/tone documentation](https://fathom.video/share/xybaVBpSuJts17kUsrz_Ad8TjH6qerE2?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)
  - [Team to consider more granular, topic-based competitor analysis in future](https://fathom.video/share/xybaVBpSuJts17kUsrz_Ad8TjH6qerE2?tab=summary&timestamp=2346.0)
  - [Ongoing monitoring of content performance to inform strategy refinement](https://fathom.video/share/xybaVBpSuJts17kUsrz_Ad8TjH6qerE2?tab=summary&timestamp=2361.0)
  - [Maintain open communication on any changes to product naming, positioning, or key features](https://fathom.video/share/xybaVBpSuJts17kUsrz_Ad8TjH6qerE2?tab=summary&timestamp=2599.0)
